subcodes.first_line: I have sought refuge with the Possessor of the Dominion and the Kingdom. I have sought shelter with the Posessor of Power and Sovereignty. I have trusted in the Living who neither sleeps nor dies
subcodes.first_line_orig: بسم الله الرحمن الرحیم. تحصنت بذی الملک و الملکوت و اعتصمت بذی العزة و الجبروت
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for protection, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times
